description_long: This object is a stylized electronics retail display setup, featuring multiple shelving units and display cases arranged on a patterned platform. The back row consists of tall, rectangular display cabinets with transparent doors and green 'SALE' signage above, likely for showcasing larger electronics or appliances. In front of these are two shorter, double-sided shelving units with open compartments, suitable for smaller boxed electronics or accessories. To the left, there is a checkout counter with a register and a small display area, suggesting a point-of-sale function. The floor is covered with a geometric patterned surface, demarcating the retail area. The overall color scheme is a mix of white, light green, and blue, giving it a clean, modern, and inviting appearance.
description: A stylized electronics retail display area with tall display cabinets, double-sided shelving, and a checkout counter, all set on a patterned platform in green, white, and blue.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full layout: tall display cabinets with 'SALE' signs at the back, two double-sided shelving units in the middle, and a checkout counter to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelving units and the checkout counter's position relative to the rest of the display.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backs of the tall display cabinets and the closed rear sides of the shelving units.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the display cabinets and the arrangement of the shelving and counter from a different angle.
